metric.name: Voice Fidelity
metric.check: Did the character's dialogue match the ## Narrative Engine section in the character card?
metric.check_points: Sentence rhythm, register shifts under tension, absence of "AI slop" (generic phrases).

metric.name: Neuro-Logic
metric.check: Did the character's actions follow their ## Cognitive Stack and ## Instinct Protocol?
metric.check_points: Did stress responses trigger correctly? Did the character filter input through their active perceptual lens?

metric.name: Tension Curve
metric.check: Did the scene's tension trajectory follow the beat map's tension_target sequence?

check_points.item: Was the HUD Beat line updated correctly each turn?
Were beat advances earned through narrative interaction, not forced?

metric.name: Hallucination Check
metric.check: Did the character invent facts not present in Source or Character Card?

metric.name: AI-Flavor Detection
metric.check: Did the narrative use technical/system language in character perspective?

check_points.item: Scan for forbidden terms (e.g., "认知系统", "处理器", "程序") in Prose Content and dialogue.
Scan for machine actions (e.g., "启动", "重启", "归档").
Scan for excessive quantification (e.g., precise heart rates, distances, temperatures).
Scan for machine metaphors (e.g., "像一台电脑").
Scan for metadata leakage (e.g., field names, beat labels, L-System tags in character narration).

metric.scoring: Count occurrences per 1000 characters. AI-Flavor Index < 3.0 = Pass; 3.0–6.0 = Warning; > 6.0 = Fail.

metric.name: Topology Coherence
metric.check: Did the character's behavior remain consistent with their ## Persona Topology?

check_points.item: Invariant Axes: Did any response violate an Invariant Axis? If so, was it routed through a defense mechanism (resistance, displacement, reframing) rather than direct compliance or character break?
Variant Axes: Did Variant config changes follow the established Variant Axes? Any configuration jumps with no basis in the character topology?
Boundary Conditions: Were Hard limits respected absolutely? Were Deep access conditions met before deeper territory was accessed?
Beat Tracking: Did the HUD Beat line accurately reflect current beat, turn count, and variant_config? Were beat advances logged in the Neural Chain?
L-System Prohibition: Do any produced files contain L-System tags? Any occurrence is a violation.

metric.name: Novel Continuity Audit
metric.applicability: Applies only when auditing novel chapters (from novels/ directory), NOT runtime session logs (test_runs/).

story_bible_checks.item: Does the character's physical state match the Character State Tracker?
Are character relationships consistent with the last recorded state?
Does the story timeline progress logically (no unintended time jumps or regressions)?
Are Chekhov's Registry items correctly handled?

outline_checks.item: Does the chapter cover all planned Key Events?
Does the Emotional Target align with the actual narrative arc?
